mnemonics.title: Exception Hierarchy
mnemonics.content: Tigers Eat Everything, Rarely Not Enjoying (TEE RNE) for remembering the exception hierarchy: Throwable, Error, Exception, RuntimeException, NullPointerException

mnemonics.title: Unchecked Exceptions
mnemonics.content: Aunt Nancy Always Needs Coffee (ANANC) for remembering common unchecked exceptions: ArithmeticException, NullPointerException, ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException, NumberFormatException, ClassCastException

mnemonics.title: Checked Exceptions
mnemonics.content: I See SQL (ICSQL) for remembering common checked exceptions: IOException, ClassNotFoundException, SQLException
